name: Bhai Harbaljeet Singh (Batala)
body: Bhai Harbaljeet Singh Ji was born in Naushera in the year 1979. At the age of 7, he began his formal training of Gurmat Sangeet from his father, Sardar Anoop Singh Ji. His two brothers, Bhai Gurmeet Singh Ji and Bhai Jagdarshan Singh Ji also took their initial training from their father. Subsequently, Bhai Harbaljeet Singh Ji and Bhai Gurmeet Singh Ji were sent to pursue further training in music from Master Chaman Lal Ji and Master Parkash Dhariwal Ji. In 1990, they came under the guidance of Master Darshan Singh Ji from Batala. Bhai Jagdarshan Singh Ji was trained in tabla by Bhai Jarnail Singh Ji from Sundarnagar.  The three of them formed their own ‘jatha’ and then moved to Saket Mandi in the state of Himachal Pradesh. They performed Kirtan regularly in Saket Mandi for 10 years after which they moved to Pipli Sahib, where they performed Kirtan for approximately 5 to 6 years. Their ‘jatha’ has also toured extensively to many countries such as Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, England, Canada and USA. Currently, they are serving in Darbar Shri Guru Granth Sahib in Fresno, California. Bhai Harbaljeet Singh Ji also teaches Gurmat Sangeet to many students from around the world. If anyone has more recordings of Bhai Harbaljeet Singh Ji to share, please contact us.
The following Shabads were obtained from the Soundcloud page of Veer Sukhvinder Singh Rayat. Please visit his page for more recordings https://soundcloud.com/sukhi-rayat
